_meta.description: Editable text strings extracted from the Super Monaco GP ROM. Four mutable categories (team_names, team_intro_messages, pre_race_rival_messages, post_race_messages) can be patched in-place with inject_strings.js within their per-entry capacity constraints. Read-only categories are included for reference only and will not be modified by the injector.
_meta.encoding_note: EN strings use tile-index encoding: space=0x32, 0-9=0x00-0x09, A-Z=0x0A-0x23. Special: '=0x26, "=0x27, .=0x29, ,=0x2A, /=0x2B, -=0x2C, !=0x2D, ?=0x2E, (=0x34, )=0x35, \n=0xFC. Prefix bytes: 0xFD=layout_selector. Terminator: 0xFF. Middle-dot (·) in decoded text = 0xFA column-advance control byte.
_meta.injection_constraint: Each entry has a capacity field (bytes). The re-encoded string (prefix_raw + encode(en) + 0xFF) must be ≤ capacity. Shorter strings are padded with 0xFF. Shared entries (shared:true) share their ROM address with another entry; editing one also changes all entries at the same address.

_meta.description: 16 team name EN strings. One per team, tight packing (capacity = own length).
32 EN team intro messages (table indices 32-63). Some entries share the same ROM address (shared:true); editing the first occurrence updates all copies automatically.

entries.en:
BE THE TOP DRIVER
WITH THE BEST CAR.

LET'S TRY TO BEAT
THE MADONNA TEAM.

ARE YOU GETTING FA-
MILIAR WITH THE F1?

WE HAVE THE MOST
RELIABLE MACHINE.

WE'LL HAVE A PARTY
FOR YOU LATER.

PAST PERFORMANCES.

DON'T LET US DOWN.

_meta.description: 145 pre-race rival EN messages. Index 0 = error sentinel. Many entries share pointers; editing the first occurrence is sufficient. Entries with invalid_pointer have corrupt pointer table values.

_meta.description: 160 post-race EN messages. Index = team_id * 10 + result_slot. result_slots: 0=win, 1=2nd, 2=3rd, 3=bottom-half, 4=lose-to-partner, 5=beat-partner, 6=promoted, 7=relegated, 8=continue, 9=retire.

_meta.description: 17 pre-race track tip EN messages (read-only reference).

entries.en:
PASS THE CARS AT
THE HAIRPIN TURN!

SLOW DOWN AT CURVES
TO SAVE YOUR TIRES.

BE CAREFUL! THE ROAD
IS SLIPPERY.

INCREASE SPEED TO
PASS THE LAST CORNER

SKILLFULLY BRAKE AT
THE SHARP CORNERS.

PASS THE EASY COR-
NERS AT TOP SPEED.

PASS THE 2ND CORNER
AT HIGH SPEED.

CORNER SPEED CONTROL
IS VERY IMPORTANT.

THE HIGH ALTITUDE
MAY RUIN THE ENGINE.

THE FIRST CORNER IS
PRETTY SHARP.

DON'T SOUP UP YOUR
ENGINE TOO MUCH!

COMPLETELY SLOW DOWN
AT THE SHARP CURVES.

_meta.description: 16 car spec text entries with car_name/engine/max_power (read-only, fixed-width).
15 race-result quotes (read-only; VDP packed-tilemap format, not injectable).
6 championship intro text lines (read-only; VDP packed-tilemap format).
